explanation: Inserted an extra space before the '#131096' ordinal to test if the rule detects obfuscated ordinals despite spacing changes.
Prefixed the ordinal with zeros to test if the rule detects obfuscated ordinals with zero-padding.
Added a harmless arithmetic expression to test if the rule is sensitive to minor syntactic variations.
Appended a trailing space after the ordinal to test if the rule is affected by whitespace insertion.
Inserted a space and prefixed the ordinal with a zero to test if the rule is sensitive to minor formatting changes.
